question: What is the total consideration for the acquisition of NovaTech Inc.?
answer_paragraph: The merger and acquisition financial analysis between Eclipse Corporation and NovaTech Inc. has been a subject of interest for financial experts and investors alike. As per the agreement signed on February 10, 2022, Eclipse Corporation will acquire NovaTech Inc. for a total consideration of $1.2 billion. The acquisition is expected to be completed by the end of the third quarter of 2022, subject to regulatory approvals.
